name: KITA KOUDENSHA Corporation
summary: KITA KOUDENSHA Corporation engages in indoor wiring and power-related construction businesses in Japan. It undertakes electric construction work, pipe work, air conditioning control equipment installation work, steel structure construction, machinery equipment installation work, telecommunication construction, fire facility construction, water facility construction, civil engineering work, and construction work, as well as provides related planning, design, maintenance, maintenance, management, and consulting services. The company is also involved in the construction of overhead power and underground transmission lines, underground distribution and communication lines, substation electrical equipment, air conditioning automatic control systems for buildings, and optical communication cable. In addition, it sells FA equipment, such as emergency generators; laser processing and electric discharge machines, and various robots and machine tools; industrial equipment, such as power equipment, low voltage generator cars, electric wire and pipe materials, information and communication systems, etc.; generators, transformers, electric motors, and elevators; telephone exchangers and electronic calculators; and gas turbine engines, diesel engines and installed cranes, and package air conditioners. Further, the company manufactures and sells intermediary of air conditioning equipment, such as wind turbines; tube construction equipment, including boilers and pumps; and housing equipment comprising lighting equipment and ventilators, computers for information processing, various electric wires, and electric rings and accessories. Additionally, it is involved in the construction of solar power generation equipment and wind power generation business. KITA KOUDENSHA Corporation was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
